title: Rootbound
pitch: You are a stationary tree whose literal root network is your skill tree - grow it tile by tile through richer, deadlier soil strata.
howto: Drag underground from your roots to grow them, spending energy per tile. Tap golden nutrient pockets for cash and trickle income, water veins for energy regen, and route around rocks and grubs. Spend nutrients on canopy levels and root powers - your network keeps earning while you're away.
controls: Drag from a root to grow. Drag elsewhere to scroll. Tap a grub to squash it. GROW button opens upgrades.
